arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic honing in on second January capture
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic are closing in on the capture of their second January signing - in the form of winger Joseph Hungbo from German outfit Nurnberg.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wigan Athletic vs. Birmingham City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Wigan Athletic and Birmingham City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'We are always quick to moan...so when we get great service, we should also be equally vocal...'
arts.sum: Our panel of Latics experts run the rule over a festive period that saw the team having to sit out New Year’s Day due to the weather...with promotion favourites Birmingham City the first opposition of 2025 this weekend...

arts.ttl: Chris Davies sent clear Birmingham City transfer demand as January pathway emerges
arts.sum: Birmingham City managed to scrape a point at Edgeley Park on New Year's Day, drawing 1-1 vs Stockport County, meaning the Blues have slipped to second place in League One due to Wycombe's triumph over Exeter City. CD needs to sort it out and play players to their strengths and positions, even if it means dropping good players to the bench.
